32 = Nursing Facility. A facility which primarily provides to residents skilled nursing care and related 
services for the rehabilitation of injured, disabled, or sick persons, or, on a regular basis, 
health-related care services above the level of custodial care to other than mentally retarded 
individuals. 
33 = Custodial Care Facility. A facility which provides room, board and other personal assistance
